title: pi-chart session state
description: Transient workspace state at sessions/current.yaml. Gitignored. Carries operator identity and current-patient context so CLI wrappers and human writes don't have to repeat author fields. Library functions only use the author field for autofill when no author is supplied.

current_patient.description: Default patientId for CLI scopes. Library functions ignore this.

current_encounter.description: Default encounter_id for CLI scopes. Library functions ignore this.
